author: codex

patch.value: Prevent shell injection through manual release workflow inputs

Manual release workflows interpolate workflow_dispatch inputs directly into run-script source. A ref, tag, or confirmation value containing quotes or shell metacharacters can change the generated shell program. Pass all GitHub expression values through step-level environment variables, quote shell expansions, and add workflow lint/static validation.
No workflow_dispatch input is interpolated directly inside a run script.; Release confirmation, tag, ref, and metadata behavior remains unchanged for valid inputs.
GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch in release-github.yml, release-publish.yml, and release-prepare.yml
Inspect run blocks containing direct workflow input expression interpolation; supply a value containing a single quote and shell operator.
User-controlled dispatch values enter shell only as quoted environment-variable data.
GitHub renders input text directly into shell source before execution.
An authorized workflow dispatcher can unintentionally or maliciously execute altered commands with release workflow permissions.

message: Document confirmed manual workflow command-injection risk before remediation

value.author: codex
value.text: All workflow_dispatch values used by shell scripts now enter through step env variables; no direct input expressions remain inside run-script source.

patch.value: No workflow run block directly interpolates workflow_dispatch input expressions.
Dispatch inputs are data rather than generated shell source.
Moved confirmation, tag, and ref values into step environment variables and quoted all shell reads.
Manual release input shell boundaries are hardened.

author: codex-auto-release

patch.value: Prevented manual release inputs from being interpolated directly into privileged workflow shell scripts.

message: Preserve the exact legacy changelog wording while retaining the original security item evidence

author: codex-release-agent
message: Remove links to superseded manual release workflows

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: The three manual release workflows were intentionally superseded by the consolidated change-aware auto-release and tag-driven release workflows tracked under jf-tike; stale file links were removed so pm validation reflects the current public repository.
